_comment: Merged into ~/.claude/settings.json by claude/agent-harness.py (install subcommand) — hooks only; permissions (allow/deny, defaultMode, bypass flags) are NEVER touched. Existing keys are preserved; each hook command not already registered is added at per-command granularity within its (event, matcher) block, so a hook can be added INTO an existing matcher block and a command already present anywhere in that event is never duplicated. Grouping is therefore free — a hook no longer needs its own group object (the old jq merge deduped whole groups by their first command, which is why lab-scope.sh used to sit alone; that workaround is gone). Hook command dirs use the literal 'HOOKS_DIR/' placeholder; agent-harness.py rewrites each to $HOME/.claude/hooks at install time, so this fragment is host-agnostic.
